info.title: Explore form infrastructure and related patterns (@explore subagent)

parts.text:
I need to understand the form infrastructure in this codebase to review a client-form component. Please find and read:

1. The Form and Field components from the `#/forms` integration (look in `integrations/forms/`)
2. The `Client_FormSchema` from `src/lib/form-schemas/client`
3. The `rpc` client from `src/rpc/client.ts` — specifically the `client.create`, `draft.getById`, `draft.create`, `draft.delete`, and `users.list` signatures
4. Any OTHER form files in `src/components/forms/` to see if there's a pattern for how forms are structured
5. The `slugify` utility from `src/lib/utils`
6. The `LogoUpload` component

Return the full contents of each file you find, and note which ones you couldn't locate. Be thorough — this is for a code quality audit.
The user wants me to find and read several files related to form infrastructure. Let me start by searching for all the relevant files in parallel.

<path>/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/integrations/forms/form.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod";
2: import { useId } from "react";
3: import type { FieldErrors } from "react-hook-form";
4: import { FormProvider, useForm } from "react-hook-form";
5: import type { z } from "zod";
6: 
7: import { FormContext } from "./context";
8: import { buildDefaults, buildFieldMap } from "./use-form";
9: 
10: export type ValidationMode = "onBlur" | "onChange" | "onSubmit" | "all";
11: 
12: type FormRenderMethods = ReturnType<typeof useForm>;
13: 
14: export type FormProps<T extends z.ZodObject<any>> = {
15:   schema: T;
16:   onSubmit: (values: z.infer<T>) => void;
17:   onInvalid?: (errors: FieldErrors) => void;
18:   defaultValues?: Partial<z.infer<T>>;
19:   validationMode?: ValidationMode;
20:   className?: string;
21:   children: React.ReactNode | ((methods: FormRenderMethods) => React.ReactNode);
22:   ref?: React.Ref<any>;
23: };
24: 
25: export function Form<T extends z.ZodObject<any>>({
26:   schema,
27:   onSubmit,
28:   onInvalid,
29:   defaultValues: defaultValuesProp,
30:   validationMode = "onBlur",
31:   className,
32:   children,
33:   ref,
34: }: FormProps<T>) {
35:   const uid = useId();
36:   const fieldMap = buildFieldMap(schema);
37:   const schemaDefaults = buildDefaults(schema, defaultValuesProp);
38: 
39:   const methods = useForm({
40:     defaultValues: schemaDefaults,
41:     mode: validationMode,
42:     resolver: zodResolver(schema) as any,
43:     reValidateMode: "onChange",
44:   });
45: 
46:   if (ref) {
47:     (ref as React.MutableRefObject<any>).current = methods;
48:   }
49: 
50:   function handleSubmit(e: React.FormEvent) {
51:     e.preventDefault();
52:     methods.handleSubmit((values) => {
53:       const parsed = schema.parse(values);
54:       onSubmit(parsed as z.infer<T>);
55:     }, onInvalid as any)();
56:   }
57: 
58:   return (
59:     <FormContext value={{ fieldMap, formId: uid }}>
60:       <FormProvider {...methods}>
61:         <form className={className} onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
62:           {typeof children === "function" ? children(methods) : children}
63:         </form>
64:       </FormProvider>
65:     </FormContext>
66:   );
67: }

(End of file - total 67 lines)
</content>

<path>/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/integrations/forms/use-form.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import type { z } from "zod";
2: 
3: export type FieldMeta = {
4:   label?: string;
5:   placeholder?: string;
6:   description?: string;
7:   component?: "textarea" | "password" | "combobox" | "checkbox";
8: };
9: 
10: export type FieldKind =
11:   | "string"
12:   | "number"
13:   | "boolean"
14:   | "enum"
15:   | "array"
16:   | "optional"
17:   | "unknown";
18: 
19: export type FieldDef = {
20:   kind: FieldKind;
21:   meta: FieldMeta | undefined;
22:   isOptional: boolean;
23:   enumEntries?: Record<string, string>;
24:   arrayElement?: FieldMap;
25:   innerKind?: FieldKind;
26:   innerMeta?: FieldMeta | undefined;
27:   checks?: string[];
28: };
29: 
30: export type FieldMap = Record<string, FieldDef>;
31: 
32: export function getKind(schema: any): FieldKind {
33:   const type: string = schema._zod?.def?.type ?? "";
34:   if (type === "string") return "string";
35:   if (type === "number") return "number";
36:   if (type === "boolean") return "boolean";
37:   if (type === "enum") return "enum";
38:   if (type === "array") return "array";
39:   if (type === "optional") return "optional";
40:   return "unknown";
41: }
42: 
43: export function getMeta(schema: any): FieldMeta | undefined {
44:   if (typeof schema.meta === "function") {
45:     const result = schema.meta();
46:     if (result && typeof result === "object") return result;
47:   }
48:   return undefined;
49: }
50: 
51: export function getChecks(schema: any): string[] {
52:   const def = schema._zod?.def;
53:   if (!def?.checks) return [];
54:   return def.checks
55:     .map((c: any) => c.format ?? c._zod?.def?.type ?? c.type)
56:     .filter(Boolean);
57: }
58: 
59: export function buildFieldDef(schema: any): FieldDef {
60:   const kind = getKind(schema);
61:   const meta = getMeta(schema);
62: 
63:   if (kind === "optional") {
64:     const innerSchema = schema._zod?.def?.innerType;
65:     const innerKind = innerSchema ? getKind(innerSchema) : "unknown";
66:     const innerMeta = innerSchema ? getMeta(innerSchema) : undefined;
67:     const checks = innerSchema ? getChecks(innerSchema) : [];
68:     return {
69:       checks,
70:       innerKind,
71:       innerMeta,
72:       isOptional: true,
73:       kind,
74:       meta: meta ?? innerMeta,
75:       ...(innerKind === "enum" && innerSchema
76:         ? { enumEntries: innerSchema._zod?.def?.entries }
77:         : {}),
78:       ...(innerKind === "array" && innerSchema
79:         ? { arrayElement: buildFieldMap(innerSchema._zod?.def?.element) }
80:         : {}),
81:     };
82:   }
83: 
84:   if (kind === "array") {
85:     const elementSchema = schema._zod?.def?.element;
86:     return {
87:       arrayElement: elementSchema ? buildFieldMap(elementSchema) : undefined,
88:       isOptional: false,
89:       kind,
90:       meta,
91:     };
92:   }
93: 
94:   return {
95:     checks: getChecks(schema),
96:     isOptional: false,
97:     kind,
98:     meta,
99:     ...(kind === "enum" ? { enumEntries: schema._zod?.def?.entries } : {}),
100:   };
101: }
102: 
103: export function buildFieldMap(schema: any): FieldMap {
104:   if (!schema?.shape) return {};
105:   const map: FieldMap = {};
106:   for (const [key, fieldSchema] of Object.entries(schema.shape)) {
107:     map[key] = buildFieldDef(fieldSchema);
108:   }
109:   return map;
110: }
111: 
112: export function deriveDefault(fieldDef: FieldDef): any {
113:   if (fieldDef.isOptional) return undefined;
114:   if (fieldDef.kind === "string") return "";
115:   if (fieldDef.kind === "number") return 0;
116:   if (fieldDef.kind === "boolean") return false;
117:   if (fieldDef.kind === "enum" && fieldDef.enumEntries) {
118:     return Object.values(fieldDef.enumEntries)[0];
119:   }
120:   if (fieldDef.kind === "array") return [];
121:   return undefined;
122: }
123: 
124: export function buildDefaults(
125:   schema: z.ZodObject<any>,
126:   overrides?: Record<string, any>,
127: ): Record<string, any> {
128:   const fieldMap = buildFieldMap(schema);
129:   const defaults: Record<string, any> = {};
130:   for (const [key, def] of Object.entries(fieldMap)) {
131:     defaults[key] = deriveDefault(def);
132:   }
133:   if (overrides) {
134:     for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(overrides)) {
135:       defaults[key] = value;
136:     }
137:   }
138:   return defaults;
139: }

(End of file - total 139 lines)
</content>

import { z } from "zod";

import { AddressSchema } from "./~utils";

export const Client_FormSchema = z.object({
  archived: z.boolean().optional(),
  assigneeId: z
    .string()
    .min(1)
    .meta({ component: "combobox", label: "Assignee" }),
  id: z.number(),
  internalNotes: z.string().optional().meta({
    component: "textarea",
    label: "Internal Notes",
    placeholder: "Internal notes about this client...",
  }),
  legalName: z
    .string()
    .optional()
    .meta({ label: "Client Legal Name", placeholder: "Acme Corporation Ltd." }),

1: import type { ControllerRenderProps } from "react-hook-form";
2: 
3: import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
4: import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
5: 
6: import type { FieldMeta } from "../use-form";
7: 
8: type StringFieldProps = {
9:   field: ControllerRenderProps;
10:   meta: FieldMeta | undefined;
11:   disabled: boolean | undefined;
12:   checks?: string[];
13: };
14: 
15: function StringField({ field, meta, disabled, checks }: StringFieldProps) {
16:   const component = meta?.component;
17: 
18:   if (component === "textarea") {
19:     return (
20:       <Textarea
21:         disabled={disabled}
22:         onBlur={field.onBlur}
23:         onChange={(e) => field.onChange(e.target.value)}
24:         placeholder={meta?.placeholder}
25:         ref={field.ref}
26:         value={field.value ?? ""}
27:       />
28:     );
29:   }
30: 
31:   const inputType = resolveInputType(component, checks);
32: 
33:   return (
34:     <Input
35:       disabled={disabled}
36:       onBlur={field.onBlur}
37:       onChange={(e) => field.onChange(e.target.value)}
38:       placeholder={meta?.placeholder}
39:       ref={field.ref}
40:       type={inputType}
41:       value={field.value ?? ""}
42:     />
43:   );
44: }
45: 
46: function resolveInputType(
47:   component: string | undefined,
48:   checks?: string[],
49: ): React.HTMLInputTypeAttribute {
50:   if (component === "password") return "password";
51:   if (checks?.includes("email")) return "email";
52:   if (checks?.includes("url")) return "url";
53:   return "text";
54: }
55: 
56: export { StringField };

(End of file - total 56 lines)
</content>

<path>/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/rpc/router/client.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { z } from "zod";
2: 
3: import {
4:   Client_FormSchema as createClientSchema,
5:   Client_FormSchema as updateClientSchema,
6: } from "@/lib/form-schemas/client";
7: import { getPresignedUploadUrl, getR2PublicUrl } from "@/lib/storage/server";
8: import { protectedProcedure } from "@/rpc/middleware";
9: import { listClientEvents } from "@/services/client-event-service";
10: import {
11:   archiveClient as archiveClientService,
12:   createClient,
13:   getClient,
14:   listClients,
15:   updateClient,
16: } from "@/services/client-service";
17: 
18: const listClientsSchema = z.object({
19:   archived: z.boolean().optional(),
20:   assigneeId: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
21:   cursor: z.string().optional(),
22:   limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).optional(),
23:   search: z.string().optional(),
24:   sortBy: z.enum(["name", "createdAt"]).optional(),
25:   sortOrder: z.enum(["asc", "desc"]).optional(),
26: });
27: 
28: const getClientByIdSchema = z.object({
29:   id: z.number().int().positive(),
30: });
31: 
32: const archiveClientSchema = z.object({
33:   id: z.number().int().positive(),
34: });
35: 
36: const listClientEventsSchema = z.object({
37:   clientId: z.number().int().positive(),
38:   cursor: z.string().optional(),
39:   limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).optional(),
40: });
41: 
42: const getUploadUrlSchema = z.object({
43:   contentType: z.string().min(1),
44:   filename: z.string().min(1),
45: });
46: 
47: export const clientCreate = protectedProcedure
48:   .meta({ permission: { action: "create", resource: "clients" } })
49:   .input(createClientSchema)
50:   .handler(async ({ input, context }) => {
51:     const client = await createClient({
52:       ...input,
53:       createdBy: context.user.id,
54:     });
55:     return client;
56:   });
57: 
58: export const clientUpdate = protectedProcedure
59:   .meta({ permission: { action: "update", resource: "clients" } })
60:   .input(updateClientSchema)
61:   .handler(async ({ input, context }) => {
62:     const { id, ...updates } = input;
63:     const userId = context.user.id;
64:     const client = await updateClient(id, updates, userId);
65:     return client;
66:   });
67: 
68: export const clientArchive = protectedProcedure
69:   .meta({ permission: { action: "archive", resource: "clients" } })
70:   .input(archiveClientSchema)
71:   .handler(async ({ input, context }) => {
72:     const userId = context.user.id;
73:     const client = await archiveClientService(input.id, userId);
74:     return client;
75:   });
76: 
77: export const clientGetById = protectedProcedure
78:   .meta({ permission: { action: "read", resource: "clients" } })
79:   .input(getClientByIdSchema)
80:   .handler(async ({ input }) => {
81:     const client = await getClient(input.id);
82:     if (!client) throw new Error("Client not found");

1: import { z } from "zod";
2: 
3: import { protectedProcedure } from "@/rpc/middleware";
4: import {
5:   createDraft,
6:   deleteDraft,
7:   getDraft,
8:   listDrafts,
9:   updateDraft,
10: } from "@/services/draft-service";
11: 
12: const createDraftSchema = z.object({
13:   data: z.record(z.string(), z.unknown()),
14:   entityType: z.string().min(1),
15:   title: z.string().min(1),
16: });
17: 
18: const updateDraftSchema = z.object({
19:   data: z.record(z.string(), z.unknown()).optional(),
20:   id: z.number().int().positive(),
21:   title: z.string().min(1).optional(),
22: });
23: 
24: const deleteDraftSchema = z.object({
25:   id: z.number().int().positive(),
26: });
27: 
28: const getDraftByIdSchema = z.object({
29:   id: z.number().int().positive(),
30: });
31: 
32: const listDraftsSchema = z.object({
33:   cursor: z.string().optional(),
34:   entityType: z.string().optional(),
35:   limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).optional(),
36:   sortBy: z.enum(["createdAt", "updatedAt"]).optional(),
37:   sortOrder: z.enum(["asc", "desc"]).optional(),
38: });
39: 
40: export const draftCreate = protectedProcedure
41:   .meta({ permission: { action: "create", resource: "drafts" } })
42:   .input(createDraftSchema)
43:   .handler(async ({ input, context }) => {
44:     const draft = await createDraft({
45:       ...input,
46:       createdBy: context.user.id,
47:     });
48:     return draft;
49:   });
50: 
51: export const draftUpdate = protectedProcedure
52:   .meta({ permission: { action: "update", resource: "drafts" } })
53:   .input(updateDraftSchema)
54:   .handler(async ({ input }) => {
55:     const { id, ...updates } = input;
56:     const draft = await updateDraft(id, updates);
57:     return draft;
58:   });
59: 
60: export const draftDelete = protectedProcedure
61:   .meta({ permission: { action: "delete", resource: "drafts" } })
62:   .input(deleteDraftSchema)
63:   .handler(async ({ input, context: ctx }) => {
64:     const draft = await getDraft(input.id);
65:     if (!draft) throw new Error("Draft not found");
66:     if (draft.createdBy !== ctx.user.id && ctx.user.role !== "admin") {
67:       throw new Error("You can only delete your own drafts");
68:     }
69:     await deleteDraft(input.id);
70:     return { success: true };
71:   });

<path>/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/rpc/router/users.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { and, asc, eq, ilike, inArray, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
2: import { alias } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core";
3: import { z } from "zod";
4: 
5: import { user } from "@/db-schemas";
6: import { db } from "@/lib/db/server";
7: import { protectedProcedure } from "@/rpc/middleware";
8: 
9: const listUsersSchema = z.object({
10:   cursor: z.string().optional(),
11:   includeBanned: z.boolean().optional(),
12:   limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).optional(),
13:   role: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
14:   search: z.string().optional(),
15: });
16: 
17: export const usersList = protectedProcedure
18:   .meta({ permission: { action: "read", resource: "team_members" } })
19:   .input(listUsersSchema)
20:   .handler(async ({ input }) => {
21:     const { cursor, includeBanned = false, limit = 20, role, search } = input;
22: 
23:     const conditions = [];
24: 
25:     if (cursor) {
26:       conditions.push(sql`${user.id} > ${cursor}`);
27:     }
28: 
29:     if (!includeBanned) {
30:       conditions.push(sql`(${user.banned} IS NULL OR ${user.banned} = false)`);
31:     }
32: 
33:     if (role?.length) {
34:       conditions.push(inArray(user.role, role));
35:     }
36: 
37:     if (search) {
38:       const pattern = `%${search}%`;
39:       conditions.push(
40:         sql`(${ilike(user.name, pattern)} OR ${ilike(user.email, pattern)})`,
41:       );
42:     }
43: 
44:     const whereClause = conditions.length > 0 ? and(...conditions) : undefined;
45: 
46:     const supervisor = alias(user, "supervisor");
47: 
48:     const rows = await db
49:       .select({
50:         banned: user.banned,
51:         email: user.email,
52:         id: user.id,
53:         image: user.image,
54:         name: user.name,
55:         phoneNumber: user.phoneNumber,
56:         role: user.role,
57:         supervisorId: user.supervisorId,
58:         supervisorName: supervisor.name,
59:       })
60:       .from(user)
61:       .leftJoin(supervisor, eq(user.supervisorId, supervisor.id))
62:       .where(whereClause)
63:       .orderBy(asc(user.id))
64:       .limit(limit + 1);
65: 
66:     const hasMore = rows.length > limit;
67:     const items = hasMore ? rows.slice(0, limit) : rows;
68:     const nextCursor =
69:       hasMore && items.length > 0 ? items[items.length - 1].id : null;
70: 
71:     return { items, nextCursor };
72:   });

(End of file - total 72 lines)
</content>
